narrative:
North Richland Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 492 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
